exercises.name: Lateral Gorilla Hops
exercises.description: Squat low and hop laterally, using your arms for momentum.

exercises.name: lateral kicks
exercises.description: lateral kicks

exercises.name: Lateral Leg Swing
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, try to keep the knees straight on the leg that you're swinging.

2. Hold on to something for balance.

3. Stand on one leg. This will be your starting position.

4. Keeping your leg straight, raise it as far out to the side as possible, and swing it back down, allowing it to cross the opposite leg.

5. Repeat this swinging motion.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge to Hop
exercises.description:
Start standing tall with feet hip-width apart. Step one foot out laterally into a deep lunge, keeping the other leg straight and chest upright. 

Push through the lunging leg to return to standing, then immediately hop off the ground, landing softly back into the starting position

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge to Side Kick
exercises.description: Perform a lateral lunge, then transition the extended leg to become the standing leg and execute a side kick with the opposite leg, returning to the starting position.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge to T-Rotation
exercises.description:
Step sideways into a lateral lunge, then rotate your torso toward the bent leg, reaching one arm upward. 

Return and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Lateral Shuttle Run
exercises.description:
Stand with feet hip-width apart. Push your hips back, keeping your back flat, and bend at the hips (not the knees) to lower your torso. 

Return to standing by pushing your hips forward. This targets the hamstrings, glutes, and core.

exercises.name: Lateral Sled Drag
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, you’ll want to step as far to the side of yourself as you can.

2) Try not to step forwards or backwards.

3) From there, engage your abdominals and lean away from the sled.

exercises.name: Lateral Stepover to Push-Up
exercises.description:
Start standing on a bench or elevated platform. Step one foot off the bench to the side, then bring the other foot down to follow so you are on the floor. 

Immediately drop into a push-up position and perform a push-up. Step back up onto the bench and repeat continuously, alternating sides.

exercises.name: Lateral Step-Up to High Knee
exercises.description:
Start standing with both feet on a bench. 

Step one foot off the bench to the side (lateral movement), then immediately drive the knee of that same foot toward your chest. 

Return both feet to the bench and repeat.

exercises.name: Lateral/ frontal slow eccentric raises
exercises.description: Later raise, rotate forward into frontal raise position , raise all the way up over head, slower slowly 4 count. Repeat.

exercises.name: Laying Hamstring Curl
exercises.description: Lie face down on the hamstring curl machine. Place your ankles under the pad. Curl the pad toward your glutes by bending your knees, then slowly lower back down.

exercises.name: Leg Press Machine Calf Raise
exercises.description:
1. Sit on a leg press machine, and place your feet against the pad about shoulder width apart. Make sure your knees are bent at the start of the exercise. 

2. Slowly push against the pad using the palm of your feet until your knee is almost straight. Then move back into the start position. Do not lock your knee straight at the peak of this exercise.

exercises.name: Leg Press Machine Calf Raise
exercises.description: In the leg press machine with legs extended, press through the balls of your feet to raise your heels. Squeeze your calves, then lower slowly.

exercises.name: Leg Press Machine Single Leg
exercises.description:
1. Sit on a leg press machine, and place one foot against the pad about shoulder width apart. Make sure your knee is bent at the start of the exercise. 

2. Slowly push against the pad using your heel until your knee is  almost straight. Do not lock your knee straight at the peak of this exercise. Then move back into the start position. 

3.  Perform as many reps on one-side, then repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Leg Press Machine Single Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description:
1. Sit on a leg press machine and press against the pad with your foot until your leg is almost straight. Then slide your feet down so that your heel is hanging off. 

2. Begin by pushing against the pad with your toes as far as you can go, pause, and return to the starting position.  

3. Perform as many reps on one-side, then repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Leg Raise to Hip Lift
exercises.description:
Lie on your back with legs extended and arms by your sides. Engage your core and lift your legs toward the ceiling while keeping them straight (leg raise). 

Once your legs are vertical, lift your hips off the ground, driving them upward to form a slight posterior tilt, then slowly lower both hips and legs back to the starting position.

exercises.name: Leopard Crawl
exercises.description: Crawl forward while keeping your knees just above the ground, engaging your core and shoulders.

exercises.name: Low leg lift with glute raise
Low plank Jacks
exercises.description:
Begin in a low plank position on your forearms. 

Jump both feet out wide, then back to the starting position. Keep your core tight and back straight throughout the movement.

exercises.name: Low Plank Single Leg Lift Hold
exercises.description: Hold a low plank position and lift one leg off the ground, maintaining stability through the core and keeping the body in a straight line.

exercises.name: Low Pull Technogym
exercises.description: Low Pull Technogym

exercises.name: Lower Calf Stretch
exercises.description:
1. For this stretch, you'll want to find a ledge or a step or if you're at home, you can use the wall.

2. Keep your heel on the ground at all times while you stretch.

3. Let your knee bend, push forward towards your toes.

4. You'll feel the stretch a little bit lower down closer to your ankle.

5. When you're done holding, switch, then do the other side"

exercises.name: Lower leg lifts with glute raise
Lunge Tap Ins
exercises.description: Step back into a lunge, then tap your back foot in next to your front foot. Return to the lunge. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lunge to Curtsy
exercises.description:
Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart. Step one leg back into a reverse lunge, bending both knees and lowering your body while keeping your torso upright and core engaged. 

From the bottom of the reverse lunge, transition directly into a curtsy lunge by moving the same leg diagonally behind the opposite leg. 

Keep your chest upright and hips back during both movements. Return to the starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Lying Barbell or EZ Bar Triceps Extension
exercises.description: Lying Barbell or EZ Bar Triceps Extension

exercises.name: Lying Floor Rope Pulls
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your back, holding the rope in both hands.

2. Pull yourself up hand-over-hand, until you reach a standing position.

3. Slowly lower yourself back to the starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Lying Hip Abductions
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your side on the mat, with your elbow supporting your head.

2. Stack your knees, and bend the knee closest to floor, bringing that foot behind your body. 

3. Slowly raise the foot of your top leg into the air, directly in line with your body, then return to the start position under control. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Lying Machine Abdominal Crunch
exercises.description:
1. Lie on the abdominal crunch machine, following the directions for the correct start position. 

2. Squeeze your abdomen, bringing your ribs down towards your pelvis. 

3. Slowly return to the start position under control and repeat.

exercises.name: Lying Piriformis Stretch
exercises.alternateName: Laying Pigeon Pose Pada Rajakapotasana Variant, thread the needle glute stretch figure four
exercises.description:
1. For this stretch, you'll feel it in the side of the hip on the leg that's crossover your other leg.

2. There are 3 positions that get your to a deeper and deeper stretch. 

3. Lie down with your one knee bent and the other foot crossover the bent knee.

4. Once you've stretched out the left side, go ahead and do the right.

exercises.name: Lying Single Leg Raise
exercises.description:
1. For this exercise, ensure your abdominals are active as your leg approaches the ground as well as when it's leaving the ground.

2. Lie with your back flat on a ground and your legs extended in front of you.

3. Place your hands on your sides with your palms down.

4. As you keep your legs extended, straight as possible, raise your right leg until they make a 90-degree angle with the floor. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second.

5. As you inhale, slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.

6. When you're done one side, go ahead and do the other.
